mapper.select: SELECT account_code, account_type AS type, master_account_code, currency, category, country, status FROM account_directory WHERE account_type = #{accountType} AND master_account_code = #{masterAccountCode}
SELECT account_code, account_type AS type, master_account_code, currency, category, country, status FROM account_directory WHERE account_code = #{accountCode}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO account_directory( account_code, account_type, master_account_code, currency, category, country, status ) VALUES ( #{accountCode}, #{accountType}, #{masterAccountCode}, #{currency}, #{category}, #{country}, 'ACTIVE' ) ON CONFLICT (account_code) DO NOTHING
